positive: A sophisticated, stylized illustration of a mystical forest creature (like a blend of an owl and a deer, with iridescent plumage and delicate antlers). The creature is centered in a lush, overgrown meadow, surrounded by whimsical flora such as bioluminescent mushrooms and glowing vines. The style should be detailed vintage botanical sketch combined with modern digital watercolor, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and deep emerald and sapphire color tones contrasted against cream and moss green backgrounds. High contrast, symmetrical composition, suitable for a repeating apparel print. --ar 1:1 --style hyperdetailed --v 6.0 --quality 2
negative: blurry, low quality, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, grayscale
